channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: A Conversation with WTO Director General Dr. Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala | The Futures Summit
item.description: WTO Director General Dr. Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala joined the CSIS Futures Summit to discuss how the WTO can navigate geopolitical shocks and spearhead mindset shifts to ensure inclusivity.

item.title: Minerals Diplomacy Meets Market Reality: The Case of Pakistan
item.description: Pakistan’s mineral resources offer long-term potential for diversifying supply chains. However, security risks, weak institutions, and structural constraints are foundational challenges that increase risk exposure for any U.S.–Pakistan minerals partnership.

item.title: Closing the Local Knowledge Gap in U.S. Competition with China
item.description: China is extending its influence at the hyper-local level, but the United States has yet to develop a comprehensive strategy to push back at the edge of strategic competition. The United States must leverage industry tools to provide the data-driven insights needed to compete.
